keyboard_help.h(3) Library Functions Manual keyboard_help.h(3)

NAME

keyboard_help.h - 🆘 Interactive keyboard help overlay for session keyboard shortcuts

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void keyboard_help_toggle (session_display_ctx_t *ctx)
Toggle keyboard help on/off. bool keyboard_help_is_active (session_display_ctx_t *ctx)
Check if keyboard help is currently active. void keyboard_help_render (session_display_ctx_t *ctx)
Render keyboard help TUI overlay. void session_display_set_global_context (session_display_ctx_t *ctx)
Set the global display context (for signal handlers like Ctrl+C). bool keyboard_help_is_active_global (void)
Check if keyboard help is active (global accessor for signal handlers). void keyboard_help_toggle_global (void)
Toggle keyboard help (global accessor for signal handlers). void keyboard_help_signal_cancel (void)
Request help screen closure from signal handler (Ctrl+C). bool keyboard_help_check_signal_cancel (void)
Check if help screen closure was requested by signal handler.

Detailed Description

🆘 Interactive keyboard help overlay for session keyboard shortcuts

Definition in file keyboard_help.h.
